name: dust-llm-capacitor
description: Capacitor plugin for on-device llama.cpp model loading over GGUF files.
author: Rogelio Ruiz Perez

scripts.test:ios: npm run build && cd example && npm install && node test-e2e-ios.mjs
scripts.test:ios:sim: npm run build && cd example && npm install && node test-e2e-ios.mjs --open-simulator
scripts.test:ios:verbose: npm run build && cd example && npm install && node test-e2e-ios.mjs --verbose
scripts.test:android: npm run build && cd example && npm install && node test-e2e-android.mjs --verbose
scripts.test:android:verbose: npm run build && cd example && npm install && node test-e2e-android.mjs --verbose
scripts.test:ios:sample: npm run build && cd sample && npm install && node test-e2e-ios.mjs --verbose
scripts.test:ios:serve: npm run build && cd sample && npm install && node test-e2e-serve-ios.mjs --verbose
scripts.test:android:sample: npm run build && cd sample && npm install && node test-e2e-android.mjs --verbose
scripts.launch:ios:sample: npm run build && cd sample && npm install && node launch-ios.mjs --verbose --open-simulator
